title: potentilla supina subsp. supina
intro: Potentilla supina subsp. supina, also known as the drupes or creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla supina subsp. supina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
